results.rationale_brief: Structured 3-part explanation of trauma nursing reforms; explanatory hard label matches multi-cause synthesis.
Historical and quantitative grounding (154조/37%); justified claim about KDB's role as climate financier.
Clear comparative of MACA vs Genesis team composition/role; specific figures cannot be independently verified.
Accurate description of multimodal RAG improvements (MLLM parsing + joint embedding space); comparative framing fits.
Reasonable Buddhism-psychotherapy parallel but somewhat abstract; sub_domain 'Clinical' is loose fit.
Specific cost/time figures plausible but unverifiable; medium difficulty matches quantitative comparison.
Precise periodontal research details (apical zone, 2/4/8wk timeline, contained defect rationale); hard comparative well matched.
Accurate ACDF vs corpectomy contrast with correct surgical hardware (cage, plate); hard comparative fits.
Detailed PDRN healing kinetics with 1.8x catch-up phenomenon; strong domain depth in periodontology.
Four-factor enumeration of startup luck is more taxonomic than comparative; less analytical depth than label suggests.
Transformer Q-K-V vs DB lookup comparison reasonable; bottom-up/top-down framing is a simplification but useful.
Enumerates attention/memory/executive components with examples; mostly descriptive listing rather than hard reasoning.
Clear KR-vs-SG income gap comparison with policy implication; Singapore figures broadly correct.
Captures climate-finance-real-economy feedback loop plus passive/active policy shift; rich comparative analysis.
Accurate non-submerging vs submerging implant protocol with healing cap/cover screw; clinical detail solid.
Anatomically precise maxillary artery branches with practical protection (guard, periosteum-aware dissection); procedural label fits.
Tariff regime 1 vs 2 contrast with rerouting/substitution rationale; defensible policy reading.
Explicit dilemma between fiscal sustainability and protection coverage; nuanced policy reasoning.
Reasonable framing of AI Basic Act presidential committee as coordinator across PIPA/copyright/etc; some claims hedged.
Surgery vs radiation complications correctly differentiated (lymphedema vs fibrosis); 70-80% RT figure plausible.
Concrete D1-D4 drilling/tapping protocol with 40N torque target and apical-tap strategy; high clinical specificity.
Bilateral vs unilateral ptosis swelling-aware overcorrection logic (1mm undercut) is clinically sensible.
AI bubble vs revolution framing largely opinion-based; lacks data substantiation for comparative claim.
Visa AI agent tokenization correctly described as reuse of existing wallet tokenization stack; coherent comparison.
Three-layer breakdown (potential + simulator + AI aerial detection) with LCOE/REC linkage; specific platform details unverifiable.
